text.title: Fine-tuning OpenAI — Basics (Dataset Preparation) Failure Modes

antipattern.fix: Run tiktoken pre-submit; abort if cost exceeds cap.

antipattern.symptom: User message followed by user message.
antipattern.fix: Validate role alternation; reject the offending line.

antipattern.symptom: Job submitted with 30 examples and no synthesis.
antipattern.fix: Synthesise via GPT-4 to ≥50; cite synthesis ratio in the cost record.
